hero.subTitle: Your Personal <highlight>Idea</highlight> Courier
hero.desc:
Collects your everyday data quietly while you use your PC.
We notify you only at the moment a truly great idea is captured.

demo.label: 02 — HOW IT WORKS
demo.title: Everything Starts with a <highlight>Single Popup</highlight>
demo.desc1: Read news, watch YouTube, and talk to AI as usual. Limina quietly accumulates data in the background, showing a popup only when a truly valuable idea is found.
demo.desc2: Click the popup to find the idea framework along with step-by-step AI prompts. Copy with one click and ask your favorite AI directly.

card.title:
Smart Drone Delivery Box
with Anti-Theft Protection
card.context: Drone delivery deregulation news × Clipboard text regarding package theft
card.desc: A smart delivery box attached to apartment verandas in the drone delivery era. Anti-theft lock + noise dampening pad + subscription model.

prompts.p1: Analyze the size of the drone delivery market and the initial target audience.
prompts.p2: Suggest 3 differentiators compared to similar overseas services.

analysis.label: 03 — AI ANALYSIS
analysis.title: Your Daily Life is Calculated into <highlight>Ideas</highlight>
analysis.desc: AI quietly analyzes collected text logs. It finds patterns, scores them, and alerts you only when the score is 8 or higher.

linesLeft.l5: [16:40 Kakao] Our home got stolen again

features.label: 04 — FEATURES
features.title: Turn Off Spams, Turn On <highlight>Inspirations</highlight>
features.desc: No forced thinking. Alerts ring only at truly valuable moments.

gatekeeper.title: 2-Step Gatekeeper
gatekeeper.desc: Applies AI scoring after data density check. Alerts only for 8+ scores. Low scores are quietly discarded.

rolling.title: 7-Day Rolling Synergy
rolling.desc: Analyzes a whole week of data. Monday's news and Thursday's memo merge to create a great business idea.

idle.title: Idle Time Analysis
idle.desc: Wakes up AI only when the PC is idle. Quietly collects text during normal use. Zero lag guaranteed.

custom.title: Interest Customization
custom.desc: AI reflects your initial interest categories. Only ideas tailored to you are delivered.

ondevice.title: Complete On-Device
ondevice.desc: All data is stored only on your PC. No external server transmission. API calls only for analysis.

prompts.title: Step-by-Step AI Prompts
prompts.desc: Provides 3-5 validation prompts for each idea. Start planning with one-click copy to your AI.

workflow.label: 05 — WORKFLOW
workflow.title: From Collection to Inspiration, <highlight>Automatically</highlight>
workflow.desc: No action required after installation. Just use your PC as usual.

step1.title: Real-time Collection
step1.desc: Chrome/Edge extension + desktop app quietly collect text only from YouTube, news, AI chats, office files, and clipboard. Supports Windows, Mac, and Linux.

step2.title: 7-Day Rolling Storage
step2.desc: Stores the last 7 days of data. Old data meets new data to create cross-synergies.

step3.title: Idle Time Analysis
step3.desc: When the PC is idle, data passing the 2-step gate is analyzed by Cloud AI. Under 8 points is quietly discarded.

step4.title: Inspiration Delivery
step4.desc: Popup alerts notify you only when a GOLD idea is captured. Check the idea framework + 5 step-by-step prompts on the dashboard and pass them to external AI.

insight.label: 06 — IDEA DASHBOARD
insight.title: Captured Ideas <highlight>at a Glance</highlight>
insight.desc: Check captured ideas anytime on the web dashboard. Save favorite ideas with a star.

item1.title: Drone Smart Delivery Box
item1.b1: Fusion of drone delivery deregulation and apartment security needs

item2.title: RPG Routine Management App
item2.b1: Aligns with gamification productivity tool trend
item2.b2: Potential blue ocean in target app market for single households

pricing.label: 07 — PRICING
pricing.title: Simple <highlight>Pricing</highlight>
pricing.desc: Free installation. Upgrade when you need truly great ideas.

cta.title: Don't Miss <highlight>Ideas</highlight> Starting Today
cta.desc:
2-minute setup. Then, just use your PC as usual.
A truly great idea is waiting for you.
cta.meta: Extensions are automatically guided after installation · 6 Languages supported
